description:
Track the critique remediation work from CRITIQUE.md as a coherent beta hardening push before adding more capabilities.

Primary goals:
- reframe Jidoka as an opinionated orchestration layer rather than just a thin wrapper
- fix concrete runtime correctness gaps
- clarify operational and durability boundaries
- harden lifecycle/compiler architecture
- stabilize public contracts, vocabulary, and interop surfaces

Dependency shape:

```mermaid
graph LR
  A[Architecture Positioning] --> B[Runtime Correctness]
  A --> C[Operational Boundaries]
  A --> E[Public Contracts]
  B --> D[Lifecycle & Compiler Architecture]
  C --> D
  E --> D
```

Source: CRITIQUE.md
title: Harden Jidoka beta architecture from critique
